_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-710001: Genehmigter Debug-Pod in Dev/Test Namespace
scenario: Platform engineer creates privileged debug pod in 'dev' namespace for legitimate troubleshooting, approved via change ticket
why_fp: User is a known platform engineer (not a service account)
hostPath is '/var/log', not '/' (not full node access)
tuning_recommendation: Limit SP-710001 to namespaces: production, staging, kube-system
Allowlist platform engineering service accounts in dev/test namespaces
